items.title: Trump cancels US envoys' trip to Pakistan for talks on Iran war
items.summary: Iran had earlier said there were no plans for a direct meeting with a US delegation led by Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner.

items.title: Explosions and gunfire as armed groups launch co-ordinated attacks across Mali
items.summary: Witnesses report clashes in the centre and north, in what has been described as the largest jihadist attack in years.

items.title: Mexico says US agents killed in crash weren't permitted to operate there
items.summary: The two Americans who reportedly worked for the CIA died in a car crash after a Mexican-led operation to destroy a drug lab.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil

items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: Some on-air claims about Dominion Voting Systems were false, Fox News acknowledges in statement after deal is announced

items.summary: • Fox-Dominion trial delay 'is not unusual,' judge says • Fox News' defamation battle isn't stopping Trump's election lies

items.title: 馬利多處遭協同攻擊　軍政府面臨多年最大挑戰
items.summary: 西非國家馬利多處今天遭叛亂分子襲擊，首都巴馬科主要機場一度關閉。軍方其後表示已重新掌控局勢。馬利政府目前由軍方主導，與蓋達組織（al-Qaeda）及伊斯蘭國（IS）分支對抗多年，如今面臨迄今...…

items.title: 川普取消美伊會談後　稱收到新提案、內容更好
items.summary: 美國總統川普今天宣布，已取消特使團原定赴巴基斯坦與伊朗展開會談的行程。他隨後表示，伊朗想談的時候，只要打電話就可以，並稱，當一取消行程，還不到10分鐘，美國就收到一份新文件，內容比原先提案好...…

items.title: 從戰地貓到救援蜜蜂　烏克蘭人戰火中不忘守護動物
items.summary: 烏克蘭軍人大多都很清楚，所有從軍的人，遲早都會變成愛貓的人。  美國有線電視新聞網（CNN）報導，無論是壕溝、檢查哨、被毀的家園還是醫療急救點，烏軍總能在前線最意想不到的地方發現貓的身影。貓...…
